debug_info.goal:
μ ν : Measure ℝ
inst✝¹ : IsProbabilityMeasure μ
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure ν
n : ℕ
i j : Fin n
h : i < j
⊢ HasLaw (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n)

failed_attempts:
classical
  -- on `WignerSpace n`, the `(i,j)` entry with `i<j` is exactly the coordinate projection
  -- at index `⟨(i,j), le_of_lt h⟩`, whose law under `Measure.pi` is `μ`.
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h.ne', h, wignerMeasureDist]
    using (MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)))

classical
  -- use the `HasLaw` of a coordinate projection under the product measure
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, (ne_of_lt h),
    wignerMeasureDist, WignerMeasure] using
    (MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi_coord (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)))

classical
  -- reduce to the corresponding coordinate map on the product space
  have hij : (i : Fin n) ≠ j := ne_of_lt h
  have hmeas : Measurable (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩) := by
    simpa using (measurable_pi_apply ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩)
  have h_eq :
      (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j)
        = (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩) := by
    funext ω
    simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, hij, h]
  -- coordinate projections under `Measure.pi` have the prescribed law
  have :
      HasLaw (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩)
        (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩) (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
    simpa [WignerMeasure] using
      (Measure.hasLaw_pi_apply (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩) hmeas)
  -- off-diagonal means the assigned measure is `μ`
  have hdist :
      wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ = μ := by
    simp [wignerMeasureDist, hij]
  simpa [h_eq, hdist] using this

classical
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, dif_neg (ne_of_lt h),
    dif_pos h] using
    (MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)))

classical
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, dif_neg (ne_of_lt h),
    dif_pos h] using
    (Measure.pi_hasLaw (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n))).trans
      (by
        simp [wignerMeasureDist, (ne_of_lt h)])

classical
  have hij : (Index.mk (p := (i, j)) (le_of_lt h) : Index n).val.1 ≠
      (Index.mk (p := (i, j)) (le_of_lt h) : Index n).val.2 := by
    simpa using (ne_of_lt h)
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, dif_neg (ne_of_lt h), dif_pos h,
    WignerMeasure, wignerMeasureDist, hij] using
    (Measure.hasLaw_pi (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (Index.mk (p := (i, j)) (le_of_lt h) : Index n)))

classical
  -- `wignerMatrixMap n ω i j` is exactly the `((i,j))`-coordinate on `WignerSpace n`
  -- since `i < j`, hence it has law `μ` under the product measure.
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, h.ne', wignerMeasureDist,
    WignerMeasure] using
    (MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (p := (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)))

classical
  -- the entry `(i,j)` with `i<j` is exactly the coordinate projection at `⟨(i,j), _⟩`
  have hij : (i : Fin n) ≠ j := ne_of_lt h
  have hcoord :
      (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j)
        = (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩) := by
    funext ω
    rw [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap']
    simp [wignerMatrixEntryFunction, hij, h]
  -- apply the `Measure.pi` coordinate law
  rw [hcoord]
  simpa [WignerMeasure, wignerMeasureDist, hij] using
    (Measure.hasLaw_pi (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩))

classical
  -- unfold the entry as the corresponding coordinate projection on the product space
  have hij : (i : Fin n) ≠ j := ne_of_lt h
  have h_eq : ¬ i = j := hij
  have h_lt : i < j := h
  have h_entry :
      (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j)
        = fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ := by
    funext ω
    simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h_eq, h_lt]
  -- now use the `HasLaw` of a coordinate under a `Measure.pi`
  have h_coord :
      HasLaw (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩)
        (wignerMeasureDist (μ := μ) (ν := ν) n ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩)
        (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
    simpa [WignerMeasure] using
      (MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi_apply (μs := wignerMeasureDist (μ := μ) (ν := ν) n)
        (i := ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩))
  -- discharge the distribution at an off-diagonal index
  have h_dist :
      wignerMeasureDist (μ := μ) (ν := ν) n ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ = μ := by
    simp [wignerMeasureDist, hij]
  simpa [h_entry, h_dist] using h_coord

classical
  have hij : (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n).val.1 ≠ (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n).val.2 := by
    simpa using (ne_of_lt h)
  simpa [WignerMeasure, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction,
    wignerMeasureDist, dif_neg hij, h, Matrix.of_apply] using
    (MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)))

classical
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, dif_neg (ne_of_lt h),
    dif_pos h] using
    (Measure.pi_hasLaw (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)))

classical
  have hij : (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n).val.1 ≠ (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n).val.2 := by
    simpa using ne_of_lt h
  have hμ' : wignerMeasureDist (μ := μ) (ν := ν) n ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ = μ := by
    simp [wignerMeasureDist, hij]
  have hproj :
      (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) =
        (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩) := by
    funext ω
    rw [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
    simp [h.ne', h, Matrix.of_apply]
  -- coordinate projections under `Measure.pi` have the prescribed law
  simpa [WignerMeasure, hμ', hproj] using
    (Measure.pi_hasLaw_coord (μs := wignerMeasureDist (μ := μ) (ν := ν) n) ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩)

classical
  -- unfold the matrix entry; it is exactly the coordinate projection on `⟨(i,j), le_of_lt h⟩`
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, dif_neg (ne_of_lt h),
    dif_pos h] using
    (Measure.pi_hasLaw (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)))

classical
  -- unfold the map and reduce to the coordinate projection on the product space
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, (ne_of_lt h),
    WignerMeasure, wignerMeasureDist] using
    (Measure.hasLaw_pi (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)))

classical
  -- this is the `Index n` coordinate corresponding to `(i,j)` (since `i<j`)
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, lt_irrefl, wignerMeasureDist]
    using (Measure.hasLaw_pi (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)))

classical
  have hij : (i : Fin n) ≠ j := ne_of_lt h
  have hmeas : Measurable (fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩) := by
    simpa using (measurable_pi_apply (i := (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)))
  have hfun :
      (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) =
        (fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩) := by
    funext ω
    simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, hij, h, lt_irrefl]
  have hlaw :
      HasLaw (fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
    refine ⟨hmeas, ?_⟩
    have : Measure.map (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩) (WignerMeasure μ ν n) =
        wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ := by
      simpa [WignerMeasure] using
        (Measure.map_pi_eval (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n))
    simpa [wignerMeasureDist, hij, this]
  simpa [hfun] using hlaw

classical
  -- identify the entry with the corresponding coordinate projection
  have h_eq :
      (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) =
        (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩) := by
    funext ω
    simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, (ne_of_lt h)]
  -- coordinate projection has the prescribed law under the product measure
  have h_law :
      HasLaw (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩)
        (wignerMeasureDist (μ := μ) (ν := ν) n ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩)
        (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
    simpa [WignerMeasure] using
      (Measure.hasLaw_coord (μs := wignerMeasureDist (μ := μ) (ν := ν) n) ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩)
  have h_dist :
      wignerMeasureDist (μ := μ) (ν := ν) n ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ = μ := by
    simp [wignerMeasureDist, (ne_of_lt h)]
  simpa [h_eq, h_dist] using h_law

classical
  -- this is a coordinate projection under a `Measure.pi` with the correct marginal
  have hij : (i : Fin n) ≠ j := ne_of_lt h
  have hmeas : Measurable (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) := by
    simpa using offDiagonalEntryMeasurable (μ := μ) (ν := ν) n i j
  -- identify it with the coordinate at `⟨(i,j), le_of_lt h⟩`
  have hEq :
      (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j)
        = fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ := by
    funext ω
    rw [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
    simp [hij, h]
  -- apply the marginal law of `Measure.pi`
  have : HasLaw (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
    -- the coordinate has law given by `wignerMeasureDist`, which is `μ` off-diagonal
    simpa [WignerMeasure, wignerMeasureDist, hij] using
      (Measure.pi_coord_hasLaw (μ := wignerMeasureDist (μ := μ) (ν := ν) n) ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩)
  simpa [hEq] using this

classical
  -- the entry `(i,j)` with `i<j` is exactly the coordinate projection on `⟨(i,j), le_of_lt h⟩`
  have hcoord :
      (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) =
        (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩) := by
    funext ω
    simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, lt_irrefl]
  -- apply the `HasLaw` of a coordinate under the product measure
  simpa [hcoord, WignerMeasure, wignerMeasureDist, (ne_of_lt h), Measure.pi] using
    (Measure.hasLaw_coord (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩))

classical
  -- `wignerMatrixMap n ω i j` is just the coordinate projection at `(i,j)` since `i<j`.
  have hproj :
      (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) =
        fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ := by
    funext ω
    rw [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap']
    simp [wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h.ne, h, le_of_lt h]
  -- coordinate projection under `Measure.pi` has the prescribed law
  have : HasLaw (fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩) (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩)
      (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
    simpa [WignerMeasure] using (Measure.hasLaw_pi_apply (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩)
  -- off-diagonal indices use `μ`
  have hdist : wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ = μ := by
    simp [wignerMeasureDist, h.ne]
  simpa [hproj, hdist] using this

classical
  -- This entry is exactly the corresponding coordinate projection on `WignerSpace n`.
  have h_eq :
      (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) =
        fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ := by
    funext ω
    rw [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap']
    simp [wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h.ne', h, Matrix.of_apply]
  -- Coordinate projections under `Measure.pi` have the prescribed law.
  rw [h_eq]
  simpa [WignerMeasure, wignerMeasureDist, (show (i : Fin n) ≠ j from ne_of_lt h)]
    using (Measure.hasLaw_pi (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩)

classical
  have hij : (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n).val.1 ≠ (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n).val.2 := by
    simpa using (ne_of_lt h)
  have hdist : wignerMeasureDist μ ν n (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n) = μ := by
    simp [wignerMeasureDist, hij]
  have hproj : HasLaw (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n))
      (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)) (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
    simpa [WignerMeasure] using (Measure.hasLaw_pi (κ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n)
      (i := (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)))
  have hentry :
      (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) =
        (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)) := by
    funext ω
    simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h.ne', h, not_lt_of_lt h]
  simpa [hentry, hdist] using hproj

classical
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h.ne', h, dif_pos h.ne']
    using (Measure.hasLaw_pi (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n)
      (p := (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)))

classical
  -- coordinate law under `Measure.pi`
  have hproj :
      HasLaw (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := by
    simpa [WignerMeasure, wignerMeasureDist, h.ne] using
      (Measure.hasLaw_pi (m := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)))
  -- identify the matrix entry with that coordinate
  have hentry :
      (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) =
        (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩) := by
    funext ω
    simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h.ne, h]
  simpa [hentry] using hproj

classical
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, dif_neg (ne_of_lt h),
    dif_pos h] using
    (Measure.pi_hasLaw (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n))
      (h_meas := measurable_pi_apply (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n))
      (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)))

classical
  -- the (i,j) entry for i<j is exactly the (i,j) coordinate projection
  have hcoord :
      (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i j) =
        (fun ω : WignerSpace n ↦ ω ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩) := by
    funext ω
    simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, (ne_of_lt h)]
  -- apply the coordinate `HasLaw` under the product measure
  rw [hcoord]
  simpa [WignerMeasure, wignerMeasureDist, (ne_of_lt h)] using
    (MeasureTheory.hasLaw_pi (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := ⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩))

classical
  -- `wignerMatrixMap` is built from coordinate projections on `WignerSpace n`,
  -- and `Measure.pi` makes these coordinates have the prescribed laws.
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, (ne_of_lt h), wignerMeasureDist,
    WignerMeasure]

classical
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, dif_neg (ne_of_lt h),
    dif_pos h] using
    (Measure.pi_hasLaw (μ := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)))

classical
  -- this is exactly the `HasLaw` of the coordinate projection in the product measure
  simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h.ne', h, wignerMeasureDist,
    WignerMeasure] using
    (Measure.pi_hasLaw (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)))

simpa [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, (ne_of_lt h)] using
    (Measure.hasLaw_pi (μs := wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) (i := (⟨(i, j), le_of_lt h⟩ : Index n)))
